meta.title: Lev Vision Realized — 10 Verbs, 5 Gates, 4 Dimensions
meta.description: The end-to-end lifecycle model: how Lev thinks, gates, and transitions. Captures the breakthrough session that resolved the taxonomy soup.

props.title: 10 Verbs · 5 Gates · 4 Dimensions
props.subtitle: The lifecycle model that resolved the taxonomy soup. How Lev thinks, transitions, and ships.

props.content: Six waves of absorption from OOO, OMX, OMC, OMO, Hermes, OpenClaw, and Clawhip. Three parliament deliberations. Sixty file drafts. One meta-substrate pattern (Declaration → Compiler → IR → Runtime). And finally, the thing we were reaching for: a fractal task model where every unit of work carries its own dna.yaml + execution.yaml + overlays, gated by 5 math-backed transitions, routed by 10 natural-language verbs. This page is the canonical snapshot.

We were stuck treating `dna/core/`, `dna/architecture/`, `dna/standards/` as peer buckets. They were fighting for the same shelf because we only had ONE dimension to slot them into. The breakthrough: **there are 4 dimensions, not 1**. Every task carries its own dna.yaml (definition half) + execution.yaml (runtime half) + overlays (plugin contributions per dimension). Plugins don't OWN anything — they project influence through overlays. Standards aren't a sibling of architecture; they're execution-time overlays. Architecture is an execution-time constraint profile. Everything fits when you stop forcing one axis.

props.label: THE 4 DIMENSIONS
props.title: What Every Task Has
props.subtitle: Freeze these four nouns. Everything else is an overlay.

props.title: 🧬 Ontology
props.content:
**What KIND of thing exists**

Node types: task, spec, component, proposal, research, decision.

Root axioms (C1, C2) live here. This is the shape of reality — what entities can even exist in the graph.

**Lives in:** `dna/graph.yaml`

props.title: 📝 DNA (Definition)
props.content:
**What IS this specific thing**

Intent, entity_kind, lifecycle_target, acceptance, local_refs, local_constraints.

The authored truth for what a task wants to be. Answers: *what is being proposed?*

**Lives in:** `.lev/tasks/<id>/dna.yaml`

props.title: ⚙️ Execution
props.content:
**HOW does it get done**

Topology, runtime_profile, validation_chain, receipt_policy, checkpoint_policy, escalation_policy, budget.

The operational form. Answers: *how does this get carried out?*

**Lives in:** `.lev/tasks/<id>/execution.yaml`

Standards and architecture are execution-time overlays.

props.title: 🪞 Projection
props.content:
**How it APPEARS**

Docs, views, exports, UI packets, TOON output, /now pages.

Lossy, scoped, time-bounded views of the graph. Multiple projections of the same truth (DNA org vs OS org vs future).

**Lives in:** `plugins/projections/<name>/`

props.label: THE 10 VERBS
props.title: Lifecycle Triggers
props.subtitle: Natural-language state transitions. Each verb is a thing a human says.

props.content:
SHAPE            PLAN              EXEC            CLOSE
  ─────            ────              ────            ─────
                                                        
┌─────────┐   ┌───────────┐    ┌────────┐    ┌──────────┐
│/research│──▶│ /propose  │───▶│ /exec  │───▶│   /qa    │
│/prior-  │   │           │    │        │    │          │
│  art    │   │ writes    │    │ runs   │    │ /accept  │
│/intervw │   │ dna.yaml  │    │ exec.  │    │          │
└─────────┘   │ +exec.yaml│    │ yaml   │    │ /handoff │
     │        └───────────┘    └────────┘    └──────────┘
     │              │               │              │
     ▼              ▼               ▼              ▼
                                                        
  GATE 1          GATE 2          GATE 3          GATE 4
                                                        
 ambiguity    frame_complete   convergence       drift
  ≤0.2         dna exists       ≥0.95           <0.3
 (OOO+OMX)      (Lev)            (OOO)         (OOO 50/30/20)
                                                        
                    │
                    ▼
         ┌──────────────────────┐
         │   DECISION POINT     │
         │                      │
         │  keep | monitor |    │
         │  execute | reject    │
         └──────────────────────┘
                 │      │      │
                 ▼      ▼      ▼
              kb     workshop  sdlc
           autowiki   monitor  ship

ROUTER: /work orchestrates all 10 verbs based on current state.

rows.produces: Orchestrates subset of 1-9 based on state

props.label: THE 5 GATES
props.title: Math-Backed Transitions
props.subtitle: Every lifecycle transition is a gate. Every gate has math. Most math was absorbed from competitors.

props.content:
GATE 1: AMBIGUITY (Shape → Plan)
────────────────────────────────
Source: OOO ooo-01 + OMX omx-02 (production verified)
Formula: ambiguity = 1 - Σ(clarity_i × weight_i)
Weights: intent 30%, outcome 25%, scope 20%,
         constraints 15%, success 10%
Pass: ≤ 0.2 (80%+ clarity)
Fail → propose /interview again

GATE 2: FRAME_COMPLETE (Plan → Exec)
────────────────────────────────────
Source: Lev (new, no competitor math)
Check: dna.yaml has all 5 fields
     + execution.yaml exists
Pass: acceptance.length ≥ 1
    AND execution.topology defined
Fail → propose /propose again

GATE 3: CONVERGENCE (Exec → Close)
──────────────────────────────────
Source: OOO ooo-05
Formula: similarity = 0.5×name_overlap
                    + 0.3×type_match
                    + 0.2×exact_match
Pass: ≥ 0.95 (ontology stabilized)
Fail → propose /exec retry OR /interview backward

GATE 4: DRIFT (Close → Done)
────────────────────────────
Source: OOO ooo-10
Formula: drift = 0.5×goal_drift
               + 0.3×constraint_drift
               + 0.2×ontology_drift
Pass: < 0.3 (aligned)
Warn: 0.3 – 0.5
Fail: > 0.5 → circuit breaker or rework

GATE 5: CIRCUIT BREAKER (meta-gate)
───────────────────────────────────
Source: Lev orchestration/heartbeat.ts
Check: consecutive_failures ≥ 3
Action: Halt lane, escalate, or fallback

rows.formula: 1 - Σ(clarity × weight), weights: intent 30% / outcome 25% / scope 20% / constraints 15% / success 10%

props.label: DECISION POINT
props.title: Universal Exit Gate
props.subtitle: Every task ends here. 4 outcomes. Each routes to a different Lev substrate.

props.title: 🧠 KEEP
props.content:
**Route to:** autowiki / kb graph

**When:** evidence is valuable but work isn't ready to execute

**Outcome:** task becomes context for future decisions. Research flows here by default.

props.title: 👁️ MONITOR
props.content:
**Route to:** workshop/

**When:** worth watching but not worth prioritizing

**Outcome:** workshop plugin tracks for later. Watch for signals that upgrade it to execute.

props.title: ⚙️ EXECUTE
props.content:
**Route to:** plugins/core-sdlc

**When:** dna.yaml + execution.yaml ready, gates pass

**Outcome:** spawns subtasks, runs topology, commits receipts.

props.title: 🚫 REJECT
props.content:
**Route to:** circuit breaker

**When:** 3 consecutive gate failures

**Outcome:** halt, escalate, or park. Not silent — always logged.

props.label: 4 OS OVERLAY
props.title: Where Each Source Lands
props.subtitle: Every competitor pattern maps to a lane + gate + verb. Density shows which lane each source strengthens.

props.content:
**Shape lane** absorbs OOO+OMX math (Socratic interview, ambiguity scoring, brownfield detection). This is where alignment happens mathematically.

**Plan lane** absorbs OOO Double Diamond + Nine Personas + OMX RALPLAN consensus + 20-role roster. This is where consensus happens before commitment.

**Exec lane** absorbs ALL 6 sources (richest lane): tmux team lifecycle (OMX+OMC), Ralph loops (OOO+OMX), Clawhip session events + pipeline + hook bridge + tmux runtime, Hermes delegation + memory composition, OpenClaw gateway. This is where the tmux control plane actually runs.

**Close lane** absorbs OOO drift measurement + 3-stage eval + HUD (OMX) + doctor/status (Hermes+OpenClaw) + circuit breaker (Lev). This is where measurement and acceptance happen.

rows.exec: Tmux team · Ralph verify · Machine API
session.* events · Dispatcher pipeline · Hook bridge · Tmux runtime

props.content:
ontology: task
intent: "Absorb Hermes delegation pattern (isolated children, budgets, tool inheritance) into core/flowmind session engine"
entity_kind: absorption-slice
lifecycle_target: exec
acceptance:
  - session.ts has delegate() method
  - child context inherits parent budget
  - tool inheritance respects skip_memory flag
  - 3 tests cover happy path + 2 edge cases
local_refs:
  - .lev/pm/parity/hermes.yaml#hm-05
  - core/flowmind/src/session.ts
local_constraints:
  - no_new_module
  - inherit_existing_budget_semantics

props.label: EXAMPLE
props.title: execution.yaml Peer File
props.subtitle: How the task runs — separate from what it IS

props.content:
topology: plan-execute-verify
runtime_profile: sdlc.flowmind.exec
validation_chain:
  - typecheck
  - unit_tests
  - integration_test_delegation
receipt_policy: full
checkpoint_policy: after_each_step
escalation_policy: surface_to_A1_on_failure
budget:
  max_iterations: 10
  context_window_pct: 70
exit_conditions:
  decision_point:
    options: [keep, monitor, execute, reject]
    default: execute
    human_override: true
overlays:
  - plugin: core-sdlc
    kind: execution
    effects:
      standards_profile: typescript-strict
      architecture_profile: hexagonal

props.label: FORMULAS
props.title: All 5 Gate Formulas in One Place
props.subtitle: Copy these into dna/graph.yaml as constraints

props.content:
gates:
  ambiguity:
    transition: shape_to_plan
    source: ooo-01 + omx-02
    formula: "1 - sum(clarity_i * weight_i)"
    weights: { intent: 0.30, outcome: 0.25, scope: 0.20, constraints: 0.15, success: 0.10 }
    threshold: 0.2
    direction: less_than_or_equal
    on_fail: propose_interview

  frame_complete:
    transition: plan_to_exec
    source: lev
    check: "dna.acceptance.length >= 1 AND execution.topology != null"
    on_fail: propose_propose

  convergence:
    transition: exec_to_close
    source: ooo-05
    formula: "0.5*name_overlap + 0.3*type_match + 0.2*exact_match"
    threshold: 0.95
    direction: greater_than_or_equal
    on_fail: retry_exec_or_backward_interview

  drift:
    transition: close_to_done
    source: ooo-10
    formula: "0.5*goal_drift + 0.3*constraint_drift + 0.2*ontology_drift"
    threshold: 0.3
    direction: less_than
    warning_threshold: 0.5
    on_fail: rework_or_escalate

  circuit_breaker:
    transition: any_to_halt
    source: lev-heartbeat
    check: "consecutive_failures >= 3"
    on_fail: halt_and_escalate

props.label: SHARED UI
props.title: The Graph Footer Every Verb Shows
props.subtitle: Same mini-prompt at the bottom of every lifecycle skill. Single source of truth.

props.content:
🧬 {workstream_id} | 📐 {active_overlays} | 🎯 {lifecycle_stage}
⏭️  Next: {proposed_next_verb(s)}
🚦 Gate: {current_gate} = {pass|fail|pending}
🌀 Decision point: keep | monitor | execute | reject

Required data to populate:
- workstream_id: from .lev/pm/workstreams/*/state/workstream.yaml
- active_overlays: from .lev/tasks/<id>/overlays/active.yaml
- lifecycle_stage: from execution.yaml.lifecycle_target
- proposed_next_verb: computed from current gate state
- current_gate: the transition gate currently evaluating
- decision_point: keep | monitor | execute | reject (set on capture)

Every lifecycle skill imports this fragment. Domain overlays
shown so operator sees which plugins are contributing.
"You are inside Leviathan workflow" signal.

props.title: 1. Lock the ADR
props.content: 10 verbs + 5 gates + 4 dimensions + decision point. Written once, stops verb churn. 10 min.

props.title: 2. Build /propose + /capture
props.content: Real skills that produce dna.yaml + execution.yaml. The load-bearing verbs. Wire to graph footer.

props.title: 3. Ship 5 gates as DNA constraints
props.content: Copy formulas from this page into dna/graph.yaml. FlowMind enforces. Math becomes official.

props.title: 4. DNA cascade on this page
props.content: Run lev exec --flow dna-cascade on this spec. Generate constraints → specs → code around the verb set. Prove the loop.
